title: La herida luminosa
writer: Julio Coll, Tulio Demicheli, Josep Maria de Sagarra
actors: Amparo Rivelles, Arturo de Córdova, Yolanda Varela
plot: Isabel and Enrique are a married couple whose life has been drifting apart over time. The point of no return comes when their only son announces he has made up his mind to become a priest.
